userPortal.loginSubtitle: The app for students, parents, and teachers — simple and separate from the school’s admin console.
userPortal.illustrationTitle: Follow school life day to day
userPortal.illustrationCaption: A portal designed for you: less technical, more human. It’s not the same screen school administrators use.
userPortal.staffHint: Are you school management or office staff?

portalHome.intro: Your dashboard: soon your schedules, messages, and practical info in one place.
portalHome.introLive: Live data from your school — schedules, menus, transport, events, and registrations.
portalHome.emptyClasses: No class assigned. On the school dashboard, set this teacher as homeroom teacher of a class.
portalHome.comingSoon: Content will connect to your school once the service goes live.
portalHome.footerDistinct: This portal is for families and teaching staff. It is separate from the school management console.
